name: Archer
long_description:
Archer lets companies programatically send hyper-personalized physical rewards for any action, milestone, or behavior.

Businesses use Archer to automate rewards across onboarding, referrals, sales, retention, partnerships, employee milestones, and customer engagement.

Rewards can range from personalized gifts and food deliveries to branded merchandise, surprise packages, team experiences, and custom curated rewards all tailored to the person, milestone, and moment.

Archer handles the infrastructure behind sourcing, personalization, delivery, payouts, and triggering so companies can turn rewards into a scalable part of how they grow and retain users using AI agents.

Reward. Anything.
